body: |
  This PR adds docs/README.md containing a concise overview of OctoAcme's project management processes (initiation → planning → execution → release → retrospective), roles and responsibilities, communication cadence, and quality assurance practices. Refs #2.

  Files added: docs/README.md

  Acceptance: documentation added to docs/ folder and references existing process docs.

  This PR links to issue #2.
